creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=c8c804a26bea483575ef005569ef5d0b47a7bafc

commit c8c804a26bea483575ef005569ef5d0b47a7bafc
Author:     Goran Mekić <meka@tilda.center>
AuthorDate: 2023-05-04 20:04:37 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-05-06 09:01:18 +0000

    sysutils/reggae: Update to 0.3.9

    Changelog: https://github.com/cbsd/reggae/releases/tag/0.3.9

      * State currently running version on upgrade
      * Use dhcpcd for IP autoconfiguration
      * Make DHCP option of mkjail
      * Enable IPC for jails
      * Set proxy after pkg bootstrap
      * Set jail allow

    PR:             271248

 sysutils/reggae/Makefile  | 2 +-
 sysutils/reggae/distinfo  | 6 +++---
 sysutils/reggae/pkg-plist | 1 -
 3 files changed, 4 insertions(+), 5 deletions(-)
